metaDescription: A Cut Above Barber Shop is a veteran-owned barber shop in San Clemente, led by Kristy Rogers with 30+ years of experience and co-owned with master barber DeAndre James.

header.title: Three decades of craft, in a shop built for you.
header.subtitle: A Cut Above Barber Shop is a clean, modern, welcoming space where every client gets attention to detail and walks out renewed and confident.

ownerCard.name: Kristy Rogers
ownerCard.subtitle: Owner • 30+ years experience
bullets: Surviving spouse of an active-duty service member
Specialist in straight razor fades, lineups, designs, gentleman's & women's cuts, color & highlights

ownerStory.openingQuote: Hi, I'm Kristy Rogers, owner of A Cut Above Barber Shop.
ownerStory.paragraph1: I've been in the barber industry for over 30 years, proudly serving the San Clemente community. I'm also a military veteran and a surviving spouse of an active-duty service member — and I take pride in providing clean, precise cuts for service members from every branch.
ownerStory.paragraph2: My specialties include straight razor fades, lineups, designs, gentleman's cuts, women's haircuts, and color services including highlights.
ownerStory.paragraph3: At A Cut Above Barber Shop, my goal is to create a fresh, modern, and welcoming space where every client can relax, feel taken care of, and leave renewed and confident.

coOwner.heading: Co-owned with DeAndre James
coOwner.paragraph1: A Cut Above is co-owned by master barber **DeAndre James**. With 12+ years of experience and a reputation for precision and creativity, DeAndre helps lead the shop alongside Kristy, bringing his own specialty in clean fades, straight razor shaves, intricate designs, hair color, and shear cutting.
coOwner.paragraph2: Together, the ownership team sets the standard the rest of the chairs follow: consistency, craft, and care — every cut, every visit.

whatMakesUsDifferent.heading: Experience, precision, and atmosphere, in that order.

cards.title: Experience
cards.body: Three decades in the chair. Consistent, high-quality results from a team that has seen it all.

cards.title: Precision
cards.body: Every fade, lineup, and razor edge is hand-finished. We don't cut corners. We cut hair.

cards.title: Atmosphere
cards.body: A clean, modern shop where you can relax, refresh, and recharge, not a chair-shop conveyor belt.

ctaSubline: Walk-ins welcome. Same-day appointments often available. Call or text to lock in your barber.
